description: Zhipu AI GLM-5V-Turbo is a large language model with 9B parameters supporting vision-language tasks
card_text:
GLM-5V-Turbo from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 1
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 202,752 tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** vision-language understanding, general text generation and analysis

Comparative metadata: weekly tokens 8.42B; context window 202,752 tokens; released 2026-04-01; pricing $1.2/M input and $4/M output.
